parameters.subject: =[SECURITY ALERT] {{ $('Analyze Security Results').first().json.criticalCount }} Critical, {{ $('Analyze Security Results').first().json.highCount }} High findings - {{ $('Analyze Security Results').first().json.date }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ source: 'security-agent', level: 'critical', severity: 'critical', agent: 'Security Agent', message: 'SECURITY ALERT: ' + $('Analyze Security Results').first().json.criticalCount + ' critical, ' + $('Analyze Security Results').first().json.highCount + ' high findings on ' + $('Analyze Security Results').first().json.date + '. ' + $('Analyze Security Results').first().json.criticalFindings.map(function(f) { return f.title; }).join(', '), requiresResponse: true }) }}
